criteria_verification.criterion_text: Pre-flight check: if `GH_TOKEN` is unset (or empty) in `os.environ`,
criteria_verification.evidence: create_pr() reads os.environ.get('GH_TOKEN', '') on every call (no import-time caching) and returns _missing_credentials_result() when the value is falsy. Verified by TestCreatePrMissingCredentials::test_missing_gh_token_returns_missing_credentials_failure (asserts execute_mock.assert_not_called()), test_empty_gh_token_is_treated_as_missing (asserts the same for empty-string), and test_gh_token_is_re_read_on_every_call (toggles env between calls). BDD scenario test_negative_create_pr_missing_credentials passes against the real adapter via the pytest-bdd oracle.

Verified by test_success_parses_pr_url_and_number_from_stdout (expects pr_number=123) and test_pr_number_parsed_from_trailing_slash_component (multiline stdout, expects pr_number=4567). criteria_verification.evidence: _build_command() builds a Python list and passes each user value as its own argv element; _execute uses asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(*command) (no shell=True, no string concatenation).
